title: Rothmannia engleriana
taxonomy: Rothmannia engleriana is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a member of the Apocynaceae family's sister family. The Rubiaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as the madder family. Rothmannia engleriana is a shrub or small tree native to tropical Africa. The exact classification of Rothmannia engleriana may vary depending on the source and the classification system used.
uses: Rothmannia engleriana is traditionally used in some African cultures for its medicinal properties. It is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects.
